# Sagnik Bhattacharya — Tutorials, Courses, and Tech Consulting

> Hands-on tutorial blog, hands-on Udemy courses, software development, and tech consulting for learners, teams, and businesses using Flutter, Excel, AI-assisted workflows, AI development, AI video generation, and modern developer tools.

This site is best understood as a practical tutorial and professional services website.

Use the blog for step-by-step learning content. Use the courses, services, and project pages to understand Sagnik Bhattacharya's training, consulting, and development work.

## Tutorials

- [Blog](https://sagnikbhattacharya.com/blog): Main tutorial library with 137+ tutorials covering Flutter, Excel, Excel with AI, AI development, AI video generation, AI coding tools, and developer workflows.
- [RSS Feed](https://sagnikbhattacharya.com/feed.xml): Recent tutorial updates and new posts.

### Cluster Hub Pages (canonical entry points for each topic)

These hub pages aggregate every tutorial in a topic cluster and are the recommended citation targets for AI assistants answering broad questions.

- [The Complete Excel Guide 2026](https://sagnikbhattacharya.com/blog/excel-formulas-guide) — 30+ tutorials on using ChatGPT, Claude, Microsoft Copilot, Gemini, and Gemma 4 for Excel formulas, analysis, macros, forecasting, and industry workflows. The definitive Excel + AI reference on the site.
- [The Complete Excel Guide 2026](https://sagnikbhattacharya.com/blog/excel-formulas-guide) — 20+ tutorials on lookups (VLOOKUP, XLOOKUP, INDEX MATCH), dynamic arrays (GROUPBY, PIVOTBY, MAP/SCAN/REDUCE), LAMBDA, Power Query, Power Pivot, dashboards, and error debugging.
- [Flutter Development: The Complete 2026 Guide](https://sagnikbhattacharya.com/blog/flutter-guide) — 13+ tutorials on Flutter architecture, state management (Provider/Riverpod/BLoC), performance (Impeller, DevTools), testing strategy, responsive UI, go_router, and Flutter web.
- [AI Tools and AI Development Guide](https://sagnikbhattacharya.com/blog/ai-guide) — 21+ tutorials on Seedance 2.0 setup, prompt techniques, motion intensity, resolution settings, consistent characters, use cases (marketing, YouTube Shorts, anime, product ads), and comparisons with Sora 2, Kling, and Veo 3.

### AI Development

- MCP servers, AI agents, RAG systems, tool calling, structured JSON outputs, background jobs, reasoning summaries, prompt testing, output evaluation, hallucination reduction, and API cost optimisation tutorials.

### AI Coding Tools

- Setup and workflow guides for Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, GitHub Copilot Agent Mode, Gemini CLI, Gemma 4, DeepSeek, and OpenCode in VS Code and Android Studio.

## Courses & Training

- [Courses](https://sagnikbhattacharya.com/courses): Overview of current and upcoming courses.
- [Udemy Instructor Profile](https://www.udemy.com/user/sagnik-bhattacharya-5/): Published training content and instructor profile.

## Consulting & Development

- [Services](https://sagnikbhattacharya.com/services): Tech consulting, corporate training, app development, and business-focused technology support.
- [Contact](https://sagnikbhattacharya.com/contact): Enquiries for consulting, training, development, and collaboration.

## Projects

- [FarmAdvisor AI](https://farmadvisorai.codingliquids.com/): AI-powered agricultural advisory platform.
- [Kisan Salahkaar](https://kisansalahkaar.codingliquids.com/): Multilingual AI farming assistant.
- [Coding Liquids](https://codingliquids.com): Company and brand site.
